projectDescription: An AI-powered web app that helps users master data structures and algorithms by explaining concepts aloud using the Feynman technique, with voice transcription and GPT-powered feedback.
keyFeatures: Feynman technique-based DSA practice via voice explanation
Real-time voice recording with audio waveform visualization
Whisper (OpenAI) speech-to-text transcription via Flask backend
GPT-3.5-turbo AI evaluation of user explanations
ElevenLabs text-to-speech for spoken AI feedback
Interactive bento grid UI for topic selection
Coverage of 9 core DSA topics with animated visualizations
GPU-accelerated Whisper backend via CUDA Docker container
publicApiSurface: POST /whisper — Upload audio file, returns transcript
getOpenAiResponse(prompt: string): Promise<string> — Evaluates user explanation
textToSpeech(text: string, voiceId?: string): Promise<{audio_url: string} | null> — Converts feedback to speech
transcript(prevState, formData: FormData) — Server action for audio transcription pipeline
Recorder component — Voice recording UI with waveform visualizer
ChatCard component — Modal for per-topic practice session
